blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! You can now use **k6 Script Authoring** to bootstrap realistic tests, enrich them with telemetry or specs, improve legacy scripts, convert Postman or curl, and run the results in Grafana Cloud k6.

You have practiced:

- Opening the dedicated Assistant mode and choosing the right workflow
- Generating scripts from prompts with intentional load shapes
- Grounding scenarios in metrics, logs, traces, OpenAPI, or GitHub
- Fixing cardinality, checks, thresholds, and lifecycle issues with Assistant help
- Converting external API artifacts into k6
- Executing a first run and reading pass or fail signals

---

### More to explore

Dig deeper with canonical product documentation:

- [Use k6 Script Authoring mode](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/testing/k6/author-run/k6-script-authoring-mode/)
- [Grafana Cloud k6](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/testing/k6/)

---

### Related paths

Keep building performance discipline alongside Assistant:

- [Run your first k6 performance test](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/run-first-k6-test/)
- [Establish a performance baseline with k6](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/establish-k6-baseline/)
- [From k6 Studio recording to CI/CD pipeline](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/k6-studio-to-cicd/)
